pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh explicitly specify and check for this output path.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the PositionSensor resolution to 0.00153.
Task description explicitly instructs modifying the RotationalMotors to have maxVelocity=5.0.
Task description explicitly instructs modifying the RotationalMotors to have maxTorque=25.0.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Webots simulation world created by setup_task.sh. The expected configuration values for the PositionSensor resolution (0.00153), RotationalMotor maxVelocity (5.0), and maxTorque (25.0) are explicitly requested in the task instructions and perfectly match the verifier logic. The target output path (/home/ga/Desktop/hospital_robot_odometry.wbt) is also explicitly stated in the prompt and expected by export_result.sh.
